mapper.sql: t.id, t.project_id, t.standard_id, t.name, t.apply_user_id, t.apply_time, t.internal_audit_user_id, t.internal_audit_time, t.internal_audit_result, t.customer_sign_link, t.customer_sign_user, t.customer_sign_time, t.customer_sign_result, t.score, t.status, t.remark, t.create_time, t.update_time, p.project_name AS project_name, s.name AS standard_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM acceptance_task t LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN acceptance_standard s ON s.id = t.standard_id AND s.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
